name: lifecycle-status
description: Report current spec lifecycle status and the next safe action.

arguments.name: repo_root
arguments.description: Repository root. Defaults to the current workspace when omitted.

arguments.name: spec_id
arguments.description: Optional active spec package ID or path when multiple active specs exist.

instructions: Call active_spec_preflight first when MCP tools are available.
If multiple active specs exist, ask for or report the required spec selection instead of guessing.
If no active spec exists, use no_active_spec_context and summarize durable docs, backlog, roadmap, closure log, and archive index context.
client_support_recovery: Use MCP scan_specs or active_spec_preflight when available. If MCP tools are unavailable, inspect docs/specs and durable lifecycle indexes directly.
